objective: Final architectural sign-off on CART-S02-T02: read-only carto stats CLI command that loads the graph, calls graphStats(), and prints pluralised node/edge counts.
findings: cli.ts owns all I/O — load() reads graph, console.log(chalk.green()) prints output; no I/O in graph.ts
graphStats() is a pure function returning {nodes, edges} — display logic (pluralisation) stays in cli.ts only
Read-only invariant confirmed: no save() call, no flags, no arguments, no filesystem writes
No new dependencies introduced — only graphStats added to existing import from ./store/graph.js
Entity model unchanged — no modifications to Node, Edge, or Graph types
Offline-only deployment posture preserved — no network or database paths
graph.ts not modified by T02 — graphStats was introduced in T01 and is untouched
routing.md updated with stats documentation in three sections
All verification passes: 21 tests, clean build, clean lint
Operational impact positive for cli-ux; zero data-corruption, build-failure, or test-coverage risk
key_changes: Architectural sign-off confirmed: all I/O stays in cli.ts, graph.ts remains pure
Read-only stats command approved — no save() call, no filesystem writes
Pluralisation logic correctly localised to cli.ts display layer
Offline-only deployment posture preserved — no network or database dependency
No entity model changes; no cross-cutting concerns identified
